title: callista normalis
intro: Callista normalis, also known as the "Callista bean," is a type of orchid species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic. The health benefits of Callista normalis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. Callista normalis can be prepared in herbal form as a tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
